# Octio

> Octio is a pure-play AI company based in Pretoria, South Africa. We build, deploy, and train autonomous AI agents that run marketing, manage leads, automate back-office work, and develop custom software at unprecedented speeds.

Octio sells four autonomous AI products and three custom services. Every offering Octio sells is technology Octio uses internally first — we are our own Patient Zero.

The website at https://octio.co.za is itself an example of the company's AI Lead Generation product: a conversational AI assistant called Octo qualifies inbound visitors and books discovery calls automatically. Octo is built on the Mastra agent framework with Moonshot's Kimi K2 Turbo model.

Pricing is on enquiry — every engagement is scoped to the customer's setup before pricing is confirmed. Currency: South African Rand (ZAR / R). Engagement model varies by offering — autonomous products are subscription-based; services are project-based with optional ongoing retainers.

## Autonomous AI Products

- [AI Lead Generation & Pipeline](https://octio.co.za/products/lead-generation): Captures every inbound lead in <30 seconds, scores against ICP, replies in your brand voice, and books qualified meetings. Pricing on enquiry.
- [Voice & Chat Agents](https://octio.co.za/products/voice-chat): 24/7 AI receptionist for phone, web chat, and WhatsApp. Picks up sub-1-second, books appointments, escalates to humans. Pricing on enquiry.
- [AI Social Media Manager](https://octio.co.za/products/social-media): Drafts and publishes 40+ posts a month across LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and your blog — in your brand voice. Pricing on enquiry.
- [Newsletter Engine](https://octio.co.za/products/newsletter): Curates, drafts, and ships a weekly newsletter in your voice. Integrates with Mailchimp, Beehiiv, Substack. Pricing on enquiry.

## Services

- [Agentic Web & App Development](https://octio.co.za/services/agentic-app-dev): Custom web and mobile apps built using AI for boilerplate + senior humans for judgement. Production builds in 2-10 weeks. Pricing on enquiry.
- [Custom Agentic Workflows](https://octio.co.za/services/custom-workflows): Connect disjointed tools (CRM, calendar, support, project) into AI-driven workflows. Pricing on enquiry.
- [Corporate AI Advisory & Adoption](https://octio.co.za/services/corporate-advisory): AI strategy + governance + execution for mid-market and enterprise. POPIA / GDPR / ISO 42001 compliant. Pricing on enquiry.

## Company

- [About Octio](https://octio.co.za/#about): Patient Zero positioning — every product Octio sells powers Octio's own operations first.
- [Approach](https://octio.co.za/#approach): For products, deploy in 3 steps; for custom builds, 6-step delivery process.
- [Privacy](https://octio.co.za/privacy): POPIA-compliant data handling. Includes a self-serve deletion endpoint.

## Optional

- Founded: 2023
- Location: Pretoria, South Africa
- Engagement capacity: 3-4 active advisory engagements at any time
- Specialisation: Pure-play AI — products, services, and adoption (no general-purpose dev work; not a generalist agency)
- Languages supported: English (Afrikaans, Zulu, Xhosa, Sesotho available on Voice & Chat Agents Enterprise tier)
- Compliance frameworks: POPIA (South Africa), GDPR (EU), ISO 42001 (AI management systems)
- Team: senior-led, no junior hand-offs
- Tech stack defaults: React + Next.js + TypeScript + Postgres for web; React Native for mobile; Mastra agents on Node.js + Hono; Moonshot Kimi K2 Turbo for LLM
- BYOK pricing: customers can supply their own AI API keys for transparent, scaling-with-usage cost
